scripts.build: tsc -b tsconfig.json && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const sourceDir = path.resolve('src', 'db', 'schema'); const targetDir = path.resolve('dist', 'db', 'schema'); fs.mkdirSync(targetDir, { recursive: true }); for (const file of fs.readdirSync(sourceDir)) { if (file.endsWith('.sql')) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(sourceDir, file), path.join(targetDir, file)); } } const migrationExport = path.resolve('../../migration-export.json'); const migrationDest = path.resolve('dist/migration-export.json'); if (fs.existsSync(migrationExport)) { fs.copyFileSync(migrationExport, migrationDest); console.log('[build] copied migration-export.json to dist/'); } else { console.warn('[build] migration-export.json not found, skipping'); }"
